issue_summary: Fix FieldType so setting an analyzer on a FieldType that doesn't expect it will generate an error
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Sets the Analyzer to be used when indexing fields of this type.
   * @see #getAnalyzer
   */
javadoc_after:
/** * Sets the Analyzer to be used when indexing fields of this type. * *

* The default implementation throws a SolrException. * Subclasses that override this method need to ensure the behavior * of the analyzer is consistent with the implementation of toInternal. *

* * @see #toInternal * @see #setQueryAnalyzer * @see #getAnalyzer */
